nasb.text: But Samuel said to Saul, “I will not return with you; for you have rejected the word of the Lord, and the Lord has rejected you from being king over Israel.”

esv.text: And Samuel said to Saul, “I will not return with you. For you have rejected the word of the Lord, and the Lord has rejected you from being king over Israel.”

cnv.text: 撒母耳回答掃羅：“我不與你一同回去，因為你棄絕了耶和華的話，耶和華也棄絕你作以色列的王。”

ccb.text: 但撒母耳说：“我不会跟你回去，你既然拒绝遵行耶和华的命令，祂也拒绝你做以色列的王。”
